El dice que cómo van a ser de jaulas si son huevos de granja, a lo que le respondo que hay  granjas de muchos tipos y que las gallinas se pueden criar al aire libre, en suelo dentro de naves o hacinadas en   jaulas apiladas unas encima de otras. Nadie está obligado a ser simpático con los clientes, si bien cabría pensar que no cuesta tanto, pero descartada esta opción al menos un mínimo de cordialidad es esperable. Son varias veces que especialmente una de las cajeras ni saluda y tira el recibo en la bandeja donde pasan los artículos pagados.
La experiencia en otros establecimientos de la cadena no es así por eso parece que es un problema específico de este DIA. Con un Carrefour en San Bernardo para mí ha dejado de ser una opción comprar aquí.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Cortes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrjx-0p3lP6IcoBlTNlx4S27_fq0uWRULGKlPPRjN-jouFUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hace unos dias hice una compra grande a domicilio en DIA de calle Santa Cruz de Marcenado, entre ellos un fuet duplo. He vuelto hoy a hacer una compra y he llevado uno de los fuet que estaba en mal estado. Le explico a la cajera que lo comio mi hijo y ha estado con una gastritis 3 dias, se lo mostraba porque era evidente a simple vista y le pedia que lo cortara para verlo por dentro si queria cercionarse, para que retiraran los que tuvieran en la tienda. La discusion ha sido muy desagradadable, y lo uniico que ha hecho ha sido llamar al encargado se supone, para decirrme  que ellos desconfian de mi, que talvez no lo haya dejado refrigerado, y que lo que decia no fuera cierto.....le he dicho  que soy Medico, que mi hijo ha tenido problemas digestivos por un producto en mal estado, que solo les pedia que retiraran el producto....no estaba peleando 2,5 euros......
Vergonzoso y peligroso para la salud, , un comercio en Chamberi, con ese estilo y clase.....
.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen García Gómez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJms4LBfcRU9HO2SvfzPFrklCgpn_lG814OrlZwZwg6kAUKiSM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"9:08 no cuenten con este supermercado ni con su supuesto “horario” de apertura. La misma me dijo que cancelara el pedido junto con su compañero quien me grito diciendo que cancelara el mismo. El empleado juan es el mas grosero","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzu-31eA&fid=0x0:0xa56f2e7b20565d1a"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"JH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO-4zu5162MXirz81rj9u3Qz8nBikoOOkeZI9qLQRx9G_ql5FX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Los cajeros son unos ladrones, la primera vez, vi como una mujer reclamaba el dinero que no le habían dado al padre (mayor). Parece, que entre todos ellos tratan de hacer fondo, para después repartirselo. !Gracias, chavales!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9-fnDmwE&fid=0x0:0xf17ea2ab8d5f2864"],"When":"2024-3-7"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Pablo Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdIQPd3QhoBz98fPmQdWL9FJkAcFRIZPEyMBzD80GO84wITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here considering the purchase of a moccamaster. The sales associate was very helpful showing me the machine and answering my questions. Unfortunately I went elsewhere to purchase the machine since they don’t allow refunds if I were to be dissatisfied with the machine. I do understand it may not be feasible for a small business to do this, but you may also get fewer sales if customers don’t have confidence. I wish I could have given them my business in this case, but I will return if I need something else as they seem to care about quality coffee and sell many things associated with the craft.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Criado Nesofsky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhzAf1E84FdEbyVHcat-lfh7PZSVbRhJ-5NYrr8hB1itfYma9B_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, coffee parafernalia and excellent customer attention","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tadeusz Muller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbrMTGYUHQ6w0wtix-bg7fKJb2U4FmKApuyNypxIpl0FlQFRRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La vendedora con gafas me echó de la tienda. Resulta que con esta dependienta no se puede compartir la opinión de que tienen poca variedad de tampers para café (1–24 mm), porque lo interpreta como un ataque y no como una opinión. Pregunté si tenían cafés con una puntuación SCA concreta, es decir, la calificación otorgada por los Q Graders. La señora me respondió de forma indirecta, contando que muchas tostadoras honestas no compran cafés con certificación SCA porque no pueden permitírselo, mientras que otras tostadoras sí los compran porque tienen dinero para ello. Finalmente descubrí en la estantería que su marca, Dromedario, sí indica la escala SCA. Cuando intenté leer cuál era el perfil sensorial del café, la señora me arrancó los paquetes de las manos y me dijo que me largara de la tienda. Mi opinión de que no ponen fechas de tueste, sino solo fechas de consumo preferente, la enfadó. La señora se amparó en la ley que, según dijo, en España no obliga a indicar la fecha de tueste. Una conducta escandalosa por parte de la dependienta, que sin duda tiene multitud de clientes satisfechos, pero si eres un buscador exigente de buen café de especialidad, evita la ubicación de Vale Hermoso. Le doy una calificación de 2 debido a la gran tradición de la tostadora, que por desgracia está representada por una mujer muy nerviosa y conservadora.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susana Ordaz Espinosa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0LQiHwL5Dm1tCyTpNXeZgbSqvN2xHy8QoLXQSFr2qta5GgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Siempre compro el café allí para mi madre, está muy bueno ( es el q se ha comprado toda la vida en mi casa) y la Srta que te atiende es toda una profesional","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ANTONIO R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCi-7mXkILWMuPUFd6GQGPXybDSgLP2c3jJOORiRY3G2HtouXJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Buscando una tienda para poder comprar un buen CAFÉ en Madrid-centro no pude encontrar una mejor: con más surtido y mejor calidad de producto, junto con la tremenda amabilidad de la \"dependienta\" y sus profesionales explicaciones...repito seguro y recomendable 100%!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIle-O3gE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Álvaro D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaAj_uN3hQQRsmczfAiIK5pNYF6Nu_anyhsByQ1vV4X7mnGa1sCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El problema de Carmen es que piensa que Todo el que entra en la Tienda tiene que saber de cafés, de Marca y Todo. Y para los que nos gusta el Café pero no tenemos cultura del Café, Carmen ni quiere ni empatiza con ese público Objetivo que será nuevo pero que a la larga puede ser Recurrente aunque la tienda esté Vacía. Ella misma te invita a irte sin que compres nada. Entiendo que Carmen no es una profesora pero si podría captar nuevos clientes y no solamente vender a los que saben que es lo más sencillo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtqJH39AE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2024-2-2"},{"Name":"Antonio Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrwOHHtGnc609Pap9PHZ_aoVXEcuaLuX8JCImHoBj8mrZ4QOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tienes de cafés para poder comprar máquinas y cafés muy variados, los precios además están muy bien","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv1NSexQE\u0026fid=0x0:0xa2c833624db04110"],"When":"2024-12-8"},{"Name":"VICTOR Cano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw98ErssDiYDCEkaoeEsZSHptNJSGmEahQyoQNJ1W7dAc7zRk0Qg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quería comentar que mi visita ha sido fugaz ya que no disponía de mucho tiempo, y Carmen la maravillosa dependienta aun teniendo bastantes clientes me ha dedicado el tiempo necesario para explicarme los diferentes tipos de café de los que disponen sin ninguna prisa. Acabo de prepararme una de las recomendaciones de Carmen que ha sido el café de la casa y solo puedo decir que brillante, mucho cuerpo,amargor y acidez muy equilibrados y un sabor profundo. Mil gracias por la atención y la calidad del café. Sin duda en cuanto se me acabe estaré ahi de nuevo 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]

When I arrived home I noticed that I was charged doubled on 1 item specifically the tuna. By the way I lived near Pintor Rosales. So, I went back after almost 3 hours. I went straight to the cashier and  told her  about my concern and showed my receipt. I don't speak much of spanish and she couldn't speak english as well. So, she called  her colleague who doesn't speak english but could understand my concern. She was talking to me in spanish and tried Google translate a little bit. I can understand a little bit spanish by the way . On what I understood they couldn't give me a refund because since I already went home they couldn't validate the authenticity of my complaint . . And told me that they only give a refund if I made the complaint before leaving the store. . So, I point out why dont you check your video recording as I saw there's a lot of cameras inside the store. And she said there's no camera near POS. And I said there's camera on the side where the  I queued and I'm sure there's camera on that section where I got the tuna, for sure it captured that moment when I only took one pack not two. And as I was carrying 4 items on my hand Im sure the cameras has clear recordings on what was on my hands. But, unfortunately they don't bother to check. Cogí un par de productos marcados con el 30% de descuento por estar en fecha de caducidad. Para mi sorpresa, a pesar de que la cajera que informó cuando me cobraba de que me aplicaría el descuento al final de pasar todos los productos, solo me lo hizo de uno de los dos, casualmente el más barato. El otro me lo cobró al precio del producto sin estar a punto de caducar. En cuanto me dio el ticket, me di cuenta, volví a reclamarlo y me devolvió la diferencia en efectivo (cuando pagué con tarjeta). Pero quiero dejar esta reseña para que, desde la dirección de la tienda, se tome nota porque no es la primera vez que me ocurre. Y "casualmente" también, nunca se equivocan para cobrar de menos, siempre de más.

Señores encargados de redes sociales de Día: No me pidan que escriba un mail a no sé qué dirección de correo electrónico o que contacte con ustedes por WhatsApp. Ya bastante molestia me estoy tomando en escribir esta reseña, que, por lo visto, no es la primera ni la última que habla de esta práctica fraudulenta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIjvSebg&fid=0x0:0xe70ed3fa06fab345"],"When":"2025-4-1"},{"Name":"Esperanza Jiménez agüeros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJW9HNWdF_P2BERyWBtixKAZMsP6ICV5gHY3Xp3D9pt6NaITw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me parece muy mal que siempre haya perros en la puerta mientras los dueños compran. No dejan pasar. Hoy sin ir más lejos había 2 perros grandes sueltos en la puerta, la ocupaban entera","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nuria Nicole Rodas Tito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqhFSISlExyEmaVEtLe785ImhhPzQVVBMNA5fORF4kiVERqmRS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ya han sido varias veces que he ido a las 9:05/9:15 y todas las veces que he ido ha estado cerrado, pero no de que no te dejan entrar que ahí no hay problema, sino de estar con las persianas cerradas.
En Google Maps, supuestamente abre a las 9, lo que es normal en la mayoría de tiendas de Dia, si este Día no abre a esa hora se podría actualizar la página que pone que abre a las 9  am porque hay muchas personas.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Antonio Cañaveras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxLHCVdzMcp36qf8B8DdVN8vxvS35NJC9f_M13-e2EOr_QkVE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Trato espectacular y producto de primer nivel. Da gusto entrar en J&C: te asesoran con mucho criterio y se nota que trabajan con género TOP, especialmente en jamones y embutidos. La relación calidad-precio es más que correcta para el nivel que ofrecen.

En fechas especiales como Navidad y Nochevieja se superan, con una atención impecable incluso en momentos de mucho volumen de trabajo. Mención especial para Raúl , siempre amable, cercano y muy profesional.

Un sitio de total confianza para cualquier ocasión especial… y también para el día a día. Muy recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBUbzW_uoY5JL_8lGi3YNz&fid=0x0:0x457ec4673c7acdd7"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKnpwl_kpmYfXL-dfblrY17zZWrXGljKDOjBewEVFvfrWIROg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tienda en el centro de Madrid con jamones y quesos de gran calidad. Una tienda para volver y repetir!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Almudena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQxaDXcmqKC97y8ZPbajODGQBiH1WCzUhrCR3Wtf1CT96JOP_mSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El bocadillo de jamón ibérico una decepción la mitad era tocino de mal sabor, se te quedaba el sebo en el paladar.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nadya Wilhelmina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZSN_0D22rNLkmQRa3mEvO1g20mFGJ283CFH9Nz-V4Q6spIsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Didn’t expect much but literally beyond my expectations! I literally forgot the name of what we had but you can check from my pictures, the two were super good! We had the coffee as well which makes it nicer to have it with the pastries.. the space is quite small but we managed to get a seat. It’s a total vibe to dine in while over-looking outside!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDd89dU67zcVmdbUuPvhZ1u&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish I could eat here everyday. I was mind blown by the danish with blackberries and lemon/vanilla curd. I was so surprised by the peach inside and it was still warm when I got it. The pastry lamination was perfectly crunchy and the details with the lime on top just added the perfect touch.

Update: Have also tried more things :) All so unreal and very generous portions! We come here weekly and always find something new to try. The selection is diverse and although the store is small, the staff are quick and usually patient.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZpelZJpDo8S_gkbwo5T7F&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Randa Al Sahli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb9a2ZMGTSY2JbvXpZ_Fh9GTp2HCXYUBhRnnKd91zdxO9o326kDg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I arrived when the café was empty, yet the staff barely greeted me. When another woman wearing a headscarf entered separately, the staff asked if we were together, which felt uncomfortable and inappropriate.
I ordered a coffee with milk and a Danish pastry. The pastry was very good,but it would be nice to have smaller options, especially for children.  The coffee tasted mostly like milk. Even after asking for it to be remade, there was no noticeable improvement. The prices also felt little high — €5 for a croissant and £3 for a coffee in a very small café and dark you can barely see the pastry's (watch the vid).
Overall, the baked goods are good, but the service and pricing were disappointing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZCGpAQ1PzNv-bpS7muP_I&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Ozgur Y.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1KCreMnjyLassegq1GadqPPbnyzeoTKLEDM0hIw4sWdiMuAI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came across this hidden gem while wandering around the streets of Chamberí. The amazing smell of fresh pastries coming from inside immediately caught my attention, and I couldn’t resist stepping in. Even though it’s a small corner spot, it has a lovely charm to it.

I first ordered a coffee, which was really well made, and then tried a couple of small pastries. Both were absolutely delicious. If you’re exploring the area, this is definitely a bakery you should stop by. A cozy place with great flavors! ⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeuEirAiF2ecHQS9TPspV7&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"miranda alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxQzisbql1xagT1G-q_pyQdxDxeL7v-ScclTnb-PI8_skeDr8m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tried their quiche and savoury danish. It was good, but I’m sure it would’ve been better heated up :/ nice staff and I’ll have to go try the pastries cause they looked amazing. Perfect for a pastry, coffee, friend talk. Love the concept and SO MANY OPTIONS. Small/cozy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDazFa16Ta2K-VzEtO84T9E&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2025-11-12"},{"Name":"Emre Ç.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKsz5u6GLiyPG4h4yKQwy1ZgaAMDVZu6m_xr1hR-4nQMktM6hG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First of all, thanks so much to the ladies work here. They are really friendly and smiling. I've explored it on Google Maps, so decided exactly to eat this olive bread (pan). Each day I come here at 6 or 7 p.m., but unfortunately I couldn’t find this bread. The ladies told me to come in the morning. I said okay! Finally, I got to eat it. However, each time I came, I ate something different :) still don't know this bread's name, just tell them "this one this one" :) — The cake is a real flavor bomb.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvYgBdznowZ88tvsdPRMCn&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Silvia Di Carlo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQU7UaLzsBDkSugl61dotBCeKIqRNbbizu26wD9l0rpuSLdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Delicious pastry but the place is so busy that the whole experience is so overwhelming. I was trying to ask the staff that pastry they would recommend but it was so loud that they just said “sorry can’t hear” and left me hanging. In the end, I opted for a pastry and it was delicious…
However , pls improve the customer service. I was inside for 5 mins and I couldn’t wait to leave… Sometimes speed is not everything. I would have happily waited 5 more mins or even 10 to have a decent experience choosing  and purchasing my pastry…. Might have also spent more money to get more if I had the time and had received proper attention.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXKWJZ_7pAgIg-sfLHKLer&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Raquel Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-7K5jFlR7mCiOuhtyCk6UDOUwkME5h4UUFwkd5ZCfJ81m1zDk0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious little bakery!!! Worth the hype.
The only downside is that they have very little seats.
I had the cardamom and caramel roll. Sweeeeet but worth it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZLpVYNQn4g236SkUh2-Th&fid=0x0:0x5e05a174e0c98f53"],"When":"2026-1-6"}]

Chipata with olives on Saturday is a mush 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw-tSh_QE&fid=0x0:0xb7eded761b71a71b"],"When":"2025-3-25"},{"Name":"Marcos Vinícius Fernandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZXcmxqn1PWbiiEJO1MxqFKo3l5T0Izk6-azXbZAJ4ZgLVFUPb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Incredible but, but a little expensive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen CG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXTtqMT1ImcCrVDHrT0MGRg3zYOD84MVN-fhMwxRNavH6AHAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing real bread! 😁","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ismael","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGyhuEMGqEtG4VK5shpN5BjlHFSUojDDDPdnlYo3KrhIQtRmYRmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"¿Q ha pasado en esta panadería? Han cambiado de dueño/a? He vuelto al barrio tras dos años fuera y me encuentro q solo tienen barras de pan (a las 9am) de mala calidad, duras,poco esponjosas…. Si es Masa Mamá hace tras años eran maravilla!!! Q decepción","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alba Mínguez López-Acevedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViniA4EZ0XWJEyEeP6bol8Uz9PF4pLpwUP1JiWgA8KK_piUhbf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Encargamos un roscón de medio kg para el 5 y uno de 1kg para el día 6. El 5 fuimos a las 13h a recoger el de medio y solo les quedaban de kg. Una hora más tarde, nos tuvimos que llevar el roscón de kg porque no iban a traer el nuestro. El día 6 hemos ido a recoger el otro que teníamos reservado y directamente está cerrado. Estuvimos ayer, nos podían haber dicho algo! Y si ha pasado algo para que no puedan abrir, al menos un cartel en la puerta? Hemos estado otra hora haciendo tiempo a ver si abrían... No vivimos cerca y nos hemos acercado expresamente a por el roscón, aunque nunca más.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Galpin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj_IsFMIH2w4bkmlz5PKTGj2BHM0KKXINr_vf6-g69Fr7G8dquUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pedí una hogaza gallega y tengo que decir que no siendo el típico de masa madre, me ha gustado.

Porqué no les pongo las 5 estrellas?, acostumbrado a pagar unos 4 euros por hogazas (es verdad que esta era más grande), al pagar han sido 9 euros!

De acuerdo que los panes con harinas especiales son más caros (lo he visto por ejemplo en Amasa en Majadahonda, pero ahí está puesto muy clarito el precio/Kg) y este tenía algún tipo de harina tal vez mezcla de varias, pero mi queja más que por el precio (que me parece excesivo) es porque no he visto claramente este anunciado.

Lo llevaré a casa y lo degustaremos como un auténtico manjar.

Aún así recomiendo ir porque tienen barras a precios normales, empanadas con un aspecto increíble, etc, yo de hecho volveré me he quedado con ganas de probar las empanadas y las barras de pan.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-gY2BJw&fid=0x0:0xb7eded761b71a71b"],"When":"2022-12-1"},{"Name":"Engy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsAvLGk71lE1kzRa7oE2Vbkn6D-oI9l9A2_aDvgnKUudnuwq58=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"le faltan educación para empezar, atención al cliente inexistente. No querían ni cortar el pan. El too good to go tambien es pagado- no hace falta que te traten como si te lo estuvieran regalando- aunque aún así nada justifica el trato que he recibido hoy. Respondiendo al dueño: La experiencia empieza con el trato - no importa si tienes el mejor pan del mundo si faltas el respeto a tus clientes. Me molesta más la falta de integridad- es claro con la conversación que tuvimos que no te importa el medioambiente, y que usar TGTG te hace “perder dinero” por lo cual justificas tu trato inaceptable. Los que realmente apoyan la causa suelen hacer aún más para los clientes que están intentando hacer algo para el medioambiente así ayudan la adopción del iniciativas como el TGTG- en cambio usted, además de denegar esos clientes los básicos- estas intentando usar TGTG para darte una imagen falsa de alguien consciente  que le importa el medioambiente- que seguramente no eres.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHyIP9ag&fid=0x0:0xb7eded761b71a71b"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Daniel Kutschman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUhcaIaHpeQrhIEpNOq8c21pFKQNgXVpdOGAnAbgLFZJ3TCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor panadería en Madrid. Yo vivía en Malasaña por 7 meses y venía acá 3-4 veces cada semana. Pan con ajo/puerros, torta aceite, y las palmeras son mi favoritas. Y los jueves/viernes hay pizza de focaccia","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOvfmjsQE&fid=0x0:0xb7eded761b71a71b"],"When":"2022-7-12"}]

[{"Name":"Dilruba Erkan Ozdemir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc0eq3wtBEbYqxwyzyr-YsGNLrI_tfTFQisX-LIQRc6Gow4ljq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time I saw a place selling monkey bread and my husband really liked his pistachio pain au chocolat. However, the most important thing is that the filter coffee was super delicious, not the smell or taste of burnt. We will definitely go back to try the other goods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgpQMzhNzzD5L-NZacaMxD&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just moved to Madrid and went to go buy bread for the first time in the city and the lady working there kindly explained every bread option they had after I was a little overwhelmed. She recommended the campaña bread, which I bought and I’m really happy with. I saw their pastries and was so impressed, that I came back 5 hours later to try the pain au pistachio which was truly amazing. It didn’t have like a runny creme, but more like a pistachio butter. The quality is top tier and I think the prices are totally reasonable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8fq9QS_Cz7o9ez4vDYzL0&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Chris Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0lJsIExk_cqe015X5oYkXbbi8ru6wWAGifzzEP8p9q2tJFEhr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The bread there are fantastic and super tasty. I just don’t understand why you need to buy two portions to get the middle part of the monkey bread. Although personally I do like the edge, because it’s more crunchy.
Recommendation will be their big bread, monkey bread and Kouign Amann (very tasty even on the next day).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwh6zpBA&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Sonia T.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbQdlkXS_R_Yi5JrUXHnru1YKJ5ozMOJlyswx4zcApaxz0NX-bGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dog friendly bakery with many bread and baked good options, and a few savoury ones too. It doubles as a tiny shop for some other essentials like milks.
The staff is so nice and the service is always on point.
I'm French and I thoroughly enjoyed all the breakfasts I bought during my stay in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLw87DkQE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-6-30"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This takeaway bakery and café specializes in handmade baked goods and quality coffee beans. The interior is bright and welcoming, though there’s no seating available. The staff are friendly and attentive.

We ordered two iced lattes, a whole Monkey Bread, and a Danesa Dulce, spending around 23 EUR in total. The coffee was well-priced and enjoyable, and the pastries were also very affordable.

If you're in the area, it's worth stopping by for a coffee and to pick up some of their delicious pastries and breads.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7g4zvCg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Anna Quinlan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp_VD4zINntiOM_wcOv3kJbpyCOwei1CdqT_uhJn-UvW7G3Nhd7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Divine bakery - easily one of the best I’ve been to in Madrid. Try their pistachio pain au chocolat or monkey bread!

They have a little counter outside you can stand and eat at, but I would recommend doing take out and sitting in a nearby park","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnqMCvpAE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Nina Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9hmUHjjBS1nrNNkzP024qy_M5YiDBJIbKFV4VaqoNOes6O0Fo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely bakery which offers coffee as well.
Everything looks wonderful 🤤🤤🤤
I bought 1/2 sesame bread (the sesame smell and taste from the bread is awesome), monkey bread (first time seeing a bakery selling monkey bread ❤️)and a chocolate pistachio croissant (this combination and will never go wrong 🤭)- all of them are great 👍
The staff was very nice as well.
Will love to come back and try different pastry with coffee one morning ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTkI3rQg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-5-21"},{"Name":"Pamela Leal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfixWwO6kjc9rJ-O6otvjvpGytD_9pKRpqvk74ssV5DbfCyg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for good authentic specialty coffee and pastries made with non-artificial ingredients, this is the place for you to try out!

Baristas are super nice too!

🌱PL","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDk29jO4gE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2019-7-9"}]

At the end, no customers have no business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTQ4vcliYMHeZeUkFTJ8rRRArDLAGnQ1uiV632ldtgcjcSj0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bread heaven! This bakery proves that all breads are not created equal! We tried all of the bakeries in our neighborhood and Vanille is our favorite by far. Even beats the fancy bakeries in Almagro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC6s-mvEw&fid=0x0:0xe432df0371ee2fe0"],"When":"2021-9-12"},{"Name":"EC Processors","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZY80Kxb5ts2RkbSb3jXZ-APUrL5jP5tV_j2ZMX2n0sX5i6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Same review as their other store ! Althought this one was a take out spot.

Here is where we got their bread and untables !

They got some BOMB pastries !!

We tried the croissant with baileys (18+) contains alcohol, they pack a punch !!

The brownies and the cookies were amazing as well !

Great place to take out, can't really go wrong with this spot !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leo B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZKkJQJSC_nkugO9nWntObbkF_EGpjoro2wuluEGzoylHCuqLnmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's by far the best bakery in the neighborhood and maybe in Madrid! It's a bit far from our place but we keep coming because the quality is just so good. As a French I can tell you it's top quality 👌 so happy to find such place in Madrid. We love the pan con semillas, the brioche and the pastries, croissant, pain au chocolat, kouign amann... Go give a try !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adam Dubin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRvvxtE8kqOgAmuNGvtYSuqENA-UQXDdV3VV31zSPvt1XNjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There´s no better place to buy bread in Madrid. They should turn it into a coffee shop.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZFx4RpGwe5zKPlsJnHuuNsFvbxMC-2LcFIhRG-4MpwWu7cZ0-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"High quality bakery and pastries! [{"Name":"Abdelilah A.C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXKFUMlEJsmCkxqk2SA9BNtpbjKKZ6YLsU4zWUctlU1ZI0PFdY5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious Arabic and Middle Eastern pastries with authentic taste and fresh ingredients. The variety is impressive, from baklava to maamoul, all prepared with care. The staff is welcoming and helpful, and prices are very reasonable for the quality offered. Located on Bravo Murillo, it’s easy to reach and worth the stop if you want real homemade-style sweets in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCz8QMgt2W873XB58-Paple&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Xabier Granja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDBDFY79QSrweqnDBGDgTlRL0DAkGQXKPseySaZAr3w6G4dTyVqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quite good baklava bakery! They have a ton of variety, and buying a small box with like 10 different little types of baklava is very well priced. Personally, I'd like them to have a bit more honey, especially the more layery/nutty ones, but that's personal taste. My favorite was the bigger baklava triangle, that one seemed to have the best pastry/honey ratio. The small ones I bought were very good, just a bit too dry for my own taste, but plenty of people like them that way. It's a nice establishment to enjoy some baklava with a coffee. You should definitely check out this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLxPmv8AE&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2024-6-15"},{"Name":"Goknil Senel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcLb7tcg8T16RKgYiw2tyKYbHo3YPJ8bv-kqjjc4xdxJXB5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great baklavas and great delicacies from the Middle East. Thanks to Nawal and Valentina for their warm service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeN3RiEUr8ksbsmk0weYNB&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"George Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlf1PDgtAuS2chaX05BwT--tsWgRJATDPG7umvzqIZUyxacUwf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A destination no doubt. Dirían Lebanese Cafe they have great tea and coffee. But the star of the show are the variety of baklava and the amount of goodies.
I highly recommend stopping by it is small but 100% worth getting a spot to relax in the evening.
Well located downtown not far from glorieta de  Quevedo.
Well worth stopping by to purchase to go treats and even gift boxes which are always a winner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICVl5v38gE&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2023-12-9"},{"Name":"Yanne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgSmmW0eBoGTOJQsWCy60jbKy0_ZAlNSPLTkhDCRd6ftXwpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got an assortment of sweet treats. Everything was delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFFRH05_grtOWBUVaslngw&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Eduardo Martinez Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRmnKD9_LvD-TA7GD8cDbZxDY46c2rlw9fqpvr5QTDZkO0xhZa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best baklava in town. There are not many places in Madrid where genuinely serve this sweet, but this one is the real deal. Good service, great atmosphere and wonderful food. Definitely a must!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl0-PLNg&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2023-11-26"},{"Name":"Andrea Herrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGfJcrFUox6Uc2uvwGARo82a5TwKRMRCOYynye0hvQHMiB9Z_rJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A wonderful experience. We went for a late breakfast and we ordered the kibbe, Syrian pizza, the chicken pie, a variety of baklava and other pastries and lemonade. We loved everything. Definitely going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzpv6OlQE&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2024-6-1"},{"Name":"Dmitry Arkharov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV2kVRhym-hy34KoBHUd1n4br2IppP6lA-8U1EU_RC5Hj3wJuc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a really nice place. It’s n case you want to taste true Arabic / Bedouin / Turkish coffee and sweets from Middle East (I do recommend coffee with NO sugar / sweetener). As for the atmosphere - the only complaint is an absence of authentic music in the background","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbwZu85gE&fid=0x0:0xa642a4c36ddca57c"],"When":"2024-8-6"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Helga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiPaL-cXkumopKXRyGrN69hozW32e2NQP1H_SWhJzqtBehiw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This pastry shop used to be top-notch, but things have changed for the worse. The new staff are unprofessional and often rude, which makes visiting unpleasant. They also allow customers to bring in dogs without leashes, which is unsanitary and unsafe. To make matters worse, some of the pastries appear to be old or past their freshness date — a serious health concern. It’s disappointing to see such a decline in quality and hygiene from a place that once had such a great reputation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ricardo Llovet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1qhfGlFt52Xs9zD8---4ImaWNotONI88KoRxtYdJ4PF1eTu6S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I remember when this bakery opened decades ago the line extended around the corner of the street block. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"ekaterina Na","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpGNOCZY-5raakRW6OLdyx1a017RY6wQyYx__ML4QcnYZRDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The service is very basic, they don't seem happy to see you. Then you order, wait a long time, and get tasteless food. The club sandwich is a disgrace to every ingredient: undercooked thick toast, very dry chicken with no spices or flavor, a slide of cheap cheese and tomato, a leaf of lettuce that has seen its time. And this for 15 euros?! The disappointment is endless. It's good that we walked in without a line; it would have been a real shame to have had to wait in line to get something like this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCstoTWtQxiIIkHtapVADQA&fid=0x0:0xc597b0e78a2761d6"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Will Dowling","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyA2OYnX51CtV34I8jzzUV1FpbvSkVWEacJ_jo1GSKG1D7Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is very, very good. Baked goods are very, very good. One of the best brunch spots in madrid. Go before 12. People complain about the service and it is slow, don’t go if you’re in a rush, the food is worth it. No place in madrid has service and this place makes up for it in the food. Very, very cool spot. Baked goods unreal","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCK6wbkUx-NHNopt9PyWT5O&fid=0x0:0xc597b0e78a2761d6"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Shonigal Galshoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAksMz7rF5kJ93o1v93Hzu40dLpnVlyMRYbkpnRcRy_2UHma4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dear followers and pastries lovers,

The one with Dulce de leche, and the chocolate covered one.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3pHK3c_JONuTYitwLSAaPcUMdO5KWIbrcaOEXLEwDan8mmRU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nos gustó, paramos a tomar un café de sobremesa un sábado a la tarde y estuvimos a gusto en su terraza. Tienen también espacio dentro, para los días de frío.

Pedimos varios cafés y una cerveza (no llegué a ver qué sirvieran copas). Para acompañar, una palmera de chocolate (enorme, muy rica) y un alfajor. Tienen variedad de bollos y dulces, también algunas opciones saladas como diversos sándwiches de miga. Precios correctos para la zona.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNz5p41T7_tAPSKPOa6wPY&fid=0x0:0xf7171b35a784a6ac"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Elbuenbellaco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB5WR3ugE5FlZpMeaRsR7IN6xXBDv4NsZb6-nHCe317HbdMqtWkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hoy conocimos el local de América II en Chamberí y aprovechamos para tomar café con una media luna de manteca y un alfajor con dulce de leche.
El local es muy amplio y también dispone de una amplia terraza.
Destaco la atención de la camarera,la limpieza y sus productos frescos.
100% recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjlqKqiAE&fid=0x0:0xf7171b35a784a6ac"],"When":"2024-5-2"},{"Name":"Bernardo Naranjo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4CVxAPoi_pKHjSeOgGptN_TN8iit9zr8i0mDkfRAELcBYCbFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tienen muchas cosas argentinas!!

Fui a comprar un bombillo para mi mate, y termine comprando yerba, bombillo y un termo.

10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPjbUnqT0gvEWh2Wyczki3&fid=0x0:0xf7171b35a784a6ac"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Juan Andres Gascon Maldonado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO2o4K4aPastV29Bj-vC_qEk6qFglqGV5waStnsZ4eoWSU0Rhz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Una increíble panadería/pastelería Argentina, con precios razonables, bien situada y con variedad de productos. Un local agradable y fresco.

Las empanadas son muy buenas, recomiendo encontrar aquí el vino las Nubes, y pastelería y facturas (bollería dulce argentina) son increíbles.

Buen espacio para tomarse una cerveza 🍻 o café ☕","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRyujvaw&fid=0x0:0xf7171b35a784a6ac"],"When":"2023-4-22"}]

[{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTQ4vcliYMHeZeUkFTJ8rRRArDLAGnQ1uiV632ldtgcjcSj0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exquisite little local bakery with some truly fine baked goods","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx-6XgpwE&fid=0x0:0x2a8dd29ac06b48b8"],"When":"2023-5-27"},{"Name":"Juan Galpin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUj_IsFMIH2w4bkmlz5PKTGj2BHM0KKXINr_vf6-g69Fr7G8dquUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Obrador situado en la calle Magallanes en Chamberí, su historia se remonta a 1928 (aunque salvo las fotos, no se conservan objetos o mobiliario de aquella época).

Elaboran el pan por el método Viena que consigue una corteza mas fina, además elaboran panes especiales, me cogí un pan matzá sin levadura que es un pan que toman los judíos en su pascua para conmemorar su huída de Egipto, muy rico. Tengo que seguir probando más elaboraciones como sus croissants, etc ...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDN3cGhIg&fid=0x0:0x2a8dd29ac06b48b8"],"When":"2024-1-25"},{"Name":"Jorge Luis de la F.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsGvjXq9CgBNyYkBPeDkgfbiTOaMaYprKus6iBVdCwG7afSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Todavía no he probado el pan, después trataré de escribir mi opinión. Pero los precios me parecen desorbitados. Dos panecillos de 100 gr. y dos mini alcachofas de pan, 3,40 €. Que pasa, no se atreven a poner el precio en cartelitos a los productos?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzyqehQnihDFAKsEUB-6nASltLnhwOJ141F_xJu2VioCeXu0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Una pena saber que la panadería del barrio de toda la vida trata así a sus trabajadores. Por eso siempre hay una oferta de trabajo detrás del mostrador. Si las subidas de precio reportaran en los trabajadores, perfecto, pero pagar 6'70 € por una empanada que es la mitad de lo que era antes y una pistola medio cruda para que el dueño se enriquezca, pues no.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pedro Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnCXOMd1CIOT-P9OHOGcMhfFP8gIaPa6p6DB_JOSyAvqlLcSnb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El lunes 25/11/2024, compre en la tahona de magallanes de la calle Vallehermoso, 3 barras de pan, es una pena, como tenian hace unos pocos años el pan, era riquisimo, nos comimos una barra para comer al medioa y las otras 2 se congelarón para otros días, hoy se ha sacado una, se ha dejado descongelar,  y a la hora de comer se ha desmigado por completo, se deduce que el pan ya fue congelado anteriormente y luego te lo venden como recien hecho, pues el precio no esta congelado, 1.10€ la barra.
Sintiendolo mucho, no volvere a comprar pan este establecimiento, como en en el Magallanes.
Sun Saludo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Capkir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjBV2vkLztS5kKYrpu2XSA3WvuZAmdlznFpfbN2BwcKpL7vw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hacen ellos mismos el pan, no es como en otros sitios que lo traen medio hecho y le dan un toque al horno... Este es pan de verdad, me encanta.

Hoy me he llevado un roscón de reyes para comerlo en familia y estaba esponjoso y sabroso. ¡Qué delicia!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_1cBFaCHtne5KzqJWEo_4Hnu8kjlEgy3udTIhHUMvdZGAkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pan excelente, nada de congelado y luego horneado. Sacan hornadas continuamente. Yo creo que debe ser uno de los mejores panes de Madrid. Además tienen distintas variedades,  todas hechas por ellos. Muy buenas también las empanadas y los croissant s.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erika","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUllEZ9xblUdlOlqbL7N2TUe9QCnPakDoxDtzLHF6FjHSuyCxax=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mejor pan que he comido en mi vida! Muy rico. Lo recomendo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDq5qr3TQ&fid=0x0:0x2a8dd29ac06b48b8"],"When":"2021-7-7"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Kristan Shawgo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBrQiTe1eqZ46ProenMQRqXJ5lLlwx3qcgd560VOG1Y4bl1bOr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem! It’s so very rare that I can walk into a bakery and choose any delicious treat without concern of allergens, but I can here. The bakery owner is kind, attentive and so friendly. Can’t wait to go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx6bmgCQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x70da80509784ea7f"],"When":"2023-6-11"},{"Name":"merrili frankenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmrQYbeh2HQyw2MQ1ASklfGN2vVf0-EDkPT3wYPqE0Gsiac5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is the best! Not only are all of the chocolates delicious,(I recommend the chocolate truffles) they are all allergen friendly! If you have an allergy, you can notify the staff and they will recommend sweets that you can have. Would give this 10 stars out of five if I could. It was so wonderful to find a safe place for my son to have some treats while abroad. This is rare for an allergy child and we are so grateful. We bought the most delicious cake that we all shared, whereas usually we must bake for our son. The passion Alexander has for his work is obvious! If we lived in Madrid, we would be frequent customers. Thank you!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Touma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGgwoqc3Fgrdi2_Cxioe1C_ZdFLVEBdPbOHjf7TFOS9u2Y2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Seeing my allergic son enjoying his Christmas calendar is truly priceless. We are so eternally grateful for the important work that you do!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mario Vallejo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI_gOg3QBio_oRJNIlK9GtDIM64I5aCkTOz4DvNSCbR9SKKkLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited the Marques shop because we heard they had allergy friendly chocolate and cakes.  The shop is charming and we were immediately greeted by the owners .  The owners were so friendly and explained their cooking process, alleviating any of our concerns.  Our children loved the selection and the chocolate is delicious.   My wife and I were so happy to find some where we felt completely comfortable buying food for our son who has multiple food allergies.   A must if you are in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carrie Bloss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJunwfeee-kWJKZmhvf0jTV9HG8l_kt59lfJzjQ1NkvQ-iDrA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family just spent a week in Spain. My son is allergic to nuts and sesame and it was challenging for him to find desserts he could enjoy. He was getting disappointed at how much he couldn’t eat especially at dessert. I did a quick search of allergy friendly chocolate in Madrid and we found this amazing shop. The proprietor explained everything and gave us wonderful recommendations. (The cat tongues are a delight and the bonbons are delicious.) My son couldn’t have been happier with his bag of goodies!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dennis Bon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKj5_BW5hw-zI_d_e5BEnyNVU9SNTcbTgL2dYgA4Tl9sT3NZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow what an amazing experience! Our children are allergic to nuts/dairy/eggs and we always struggle to find deserts and treats for them - especially in Europe. We ended up going to Marques three times during our visit as the cakes and chocolates and other deserts were amazing. Literally the best allergen free cakes we have ever had! So happy to have an option like this for our next trip to Madrid. The owner, Alejandro, is also super nice and super aware of cross contamination and other allergy related issues and takes this all very seriously so we really felt safe. Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nikki Nahas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLP5QHAzAut5AaJRfQctWA5t-S14UiX_lV8ouox_A_fwz-paE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! The most FANTASTIC find in all of Spain. After two weeks traveling through the country we found not a single place that could accommodate my sons allergies. Google search found us this amazing shop and we raced to it before it closed. The owner was immediately accessible on WhatsApp and told us he would wait for us even though they were about to close. My 7 year old was literally a child in a chocolate shop! Everything we bought was unbelievably delicious! You would NEVER tell it was vegan chocolate. We sampled it all and we were so amazed by how delicious! My only complaint is that they do it shop to the US, because we could never find anything even close to this! 100 stars!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ali S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtfa_DdxXFwKrwkSu8trQ1fFRjELuNaB7VfO9X5ouvw6nocA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an incredible place for someone with an allergy. Not only is it completely safe, the owner, Alexander, was an absolute treat to talk to and the chocolate is incomparably good.\n\nI never expected to find a nut-free bakery on my trip to Madrid, but I was so pleased that I did. If I ever return to the city, MARQUÉS will be a guaranteed stop.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Our waitress was so friendly and helpful since she knew we didn't speak a lot of Spanish. Food was excellent and the cappuccino was the bomb. Awesome place. Highly recommended if you're around the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsw4a-Ww\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2020-2-12"},{"Name":"Dhoha Rashed Alshalawi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqbCCHkjwDY0mO9c-CJ71GOepIxIiJbdf-qibk0HHux69zRH8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the most beautiful places that I like to visit for breakfast, as they have a special menu every time, pastries and sweets change according to the season.  Try the croissants stuffed with cheese, tomatoes and turkey meat. I noticed as well that the croissants covered with butter and honey.  It is very delicious.  After breakfast, they offer you a tray of sweets, and you choose among them. If you don't like any of them, they return with another tray with a different assortment of delicious sweets.  I love this branch, quiet and elegant, away from the crowded center, and the waitresses serve from the heart and their manners are beautiful. Thank you for your kindness 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB7Y_bsAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2023-1-1"},{"Name":"All Things Spain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNWBdUd-QKOqlHRq6tOv_P5FR-tafflR__jzjzTVgD5WN9JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found a rare treat at this place: Kouign-amann, a French-Breton butter cake, which is fiendishly difficult to make and which might be the worlds best pastry. I paid 7.75 € for the pastry, a small milk coffee and a large freshly squeezed orange juice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDaovig3wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2021-8-17"},{"Name":"Nicky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDZ1lDxVrZRAqjY_ER8b8nOKL8F0IrjRKaec87SW_YPREwJ2I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First visit but coming back for sure! The coffee and pastries (I had the brownie) are great.

Gluten free options (brownie, cheesecake, and a coconut pastry) are available, although the specific pastries on offer at any given time might rotate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX2Y7TPg&fid=0x0:0xf51cbc0fc0db96e4"],"When":"2024-10-29"},{"Name":"Beáta Igaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW0Rc65UIMgr3j_rTxK-A9WfYU2MrdLBoL0bX6wmEu6RmsGZ3c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very friendly staff in a tiny authentic cafe. We had breakfast and coffee 2 times herewhen we were in Madrid. The pistachio croissant is excellent, and I got only here a real espresso macchiato. :) Thanks everything, that was a pleasure to find it in the city, Highly recommended when you are nearby.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID32vfbMA&fid=0x0:0xf51cbc0fc0db96e4"],"When":"2024-11-14"},{"Name":"NomadCafeVibes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJyQxTH9ZgnbyMXac7Ut1pZCtgF3uh7g1OH3N5lbUAaLB0DNdM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For our Nomad 💻 tribe, here a few comments!

• Type of working: SOLO and Couple | they have long standing tables facing the wall. Comfortable for a couple hour work either solo, or with a friend or two.
• Music: 🎵🎵 (medium) | The 2000s songs were a bit distracting as we kept singing each song 🙈 overall, it didn't bother if you have to do some admin work.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️☕️ (outstanding)

Overall: 5

* We still gave it a 5⭐️ review, because we understand that this place is not designated for nomad workers.

For the non-Nomad workers we suggest this spot for the easy-going vibes, the lovely customer service, and very tasty coffee. The price of the coffee is VERY reasonable compared to other specialty coffees in Madrid!

Give it a try!💃🏼

The employee came, took the dog away, but did not offer any sort of apology, or offer to help clean or any sort of comment of any kind. She just went back to work as if nothing had happened. Quiero destacar especialmente lo fabuloso de la atención de todo el equipo de trabajo: son unas auténticas profesionales. El trato es cercano, amable y muy cuidado; te hacen sentir bien desde el primer momento. Ojalá en todas las panaderías trabajara gente así, con esa dedicación y ese trato excelente hacia el cliente.
Los productos son fresquísimos, recién hechos y absolutamente deliciosos. Se nota la calidad en cada detalle, tanto en el sabor como en la presentación.
Además, el ambiente es muy agradable, y las vistas hacia el metro Iglesia y la rotonda Iglesia le dan un encanto especial mientras disfrutas de sus productos.
Sin duda, es una panadería súper recomendable. ¡Da gusto encontrar sitios así! 🌟","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mc Coam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFh3J88eJOcwK0TDuhS0vJP2HupuegFzsQ-mqD5UG_5DgByFn5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es una panadería que está cerca de un consulado y obliga la parada allí. Tienen gran variedad de opciones entre dulce y salado igual con las bebidas cuenta con unas mesas que se ponen a tope en horas del mediodia. Hay bastante movimiento. Venden cachitos venezolanos y otros detalles de índole venezolano.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID31IC-Rg&fid=0x0:0x1d17b0c5c0be6a33"],"When":"2024-11-12"},{"Name":"Natalia Blazco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLR3F2wadAnshTGdezaJSOleJ9GVJ2MBkwoWPYY2IuLZHWLPm4B=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El cachito venezolano que sirven no sabe para nada a lo que debería ser de paso cuesta 3,85 y parece más una napolitana de jamón y queso que cachito venezolano, el jamón nisiquiera viene picado ni esparcido por todo el pan","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhQG4rR8___n5NwS_l-K6j&fid=0x0:0x1d17b0c5c0be6a33"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Pierangela Gambino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4kkioPW-rtxsznLgZLH1csIEu58ZG1CjTWgCqLDiIbPTnAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La atención muy buena.

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Mark Sheedy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzh9i0vYzSwbTCdK6JFR-GxILwR2njXMzbv0oXyHzdhsrkMn7J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staying close by to this fantastic little bakery and gourmet food store. After some prior research I had made a mental note to drop in and buy some fresh bread. The young girl who looked after me was very kind and helpful. The assortment of cakes and sweet treats on display were very impressive and extremely tempting. In the end I purchased a large loaf of grainy bread and two small dessert cakes. One a delicious Blueberry Cheesecake, the other an Apple Tart. The tart has to wait until tomorrow night. But if it’s as good as the Blueberry Cheesecake it will be worth the wait. So happy to be staying close to this adorable place. We will return!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rara Dew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUdNDMgB929-3WZJEJNH96bC-LBpXiNsR1vpVIzAean_fK-V_z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This morning around 10.30 i went there and argued with the old lady with glasses who served there.she always nice to other people except me.her face changing whenever she saw me .i tried always to be nice to her but she never smile to me unless i gave tips .maybe because I'm not spanish .maybe she's racist!! It's not my first time buy there.i bought many times .the other dtaff the young lady is very nice to me not like this old lady with glasses. today i bought 4 muffins , first i asked her if it contain dried fruit because it would be for a gift, she didn't answer me nicely and without patience to explain. But i stop my question and i keep buying 4 muffins and i ask to put them in the box because she always put in paper package  and always destroy the muffins. But in the beginning she doesn't want to give it , she said she doesnt have and we arguing,she talked in high tone and then she said if it box not for muffins.i told her so many times it will destroy the muffins and doesnt look presentable especially if it for gift. Even i told her i would pay for the boxes,  i dont mind. Finally she gave me with bad face.and  i told her that she always rude to me compare with the other staff . Entre el moderneo de los bares de la zona mantiene la esencia de las panaderías de barrio sin ninguna pretensión con una zona de mesas para desayunar. Mostrador clásico de mármol sufrido, más cafés en vaso que en taza, parroquianos del barrio y no aceptan tarjeta. Podría estar perfectamente dentro de un mercado tradicional.

Pedimos tostada con tomate pero seguramente fue un error. El tomate generoso, de los sitios en los que más recuerdamos que nos hayan puesto, tostadas de pan de barra pequeñas. Aceite Mueloliva. Café Campanini. 2,40€. La próxima vez pediremos algo de bollería casera, tenían tejas, rosquillas, galletas de mantequilla, bayonesas, croissants de mantequilla… Ya os diremos qué tal la repostería artesanal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4s5OHUQ&fid=0x0:0xa44dfabadb28669"],"When":"2019-2-6"},{"Name":"J S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3IN0ne3qjF_M1xlynnlrgpyrr_fqSdJ5xKmyhjXmOmE35ag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No vayas si no eres cliente habitual. Everything they offer is both gluten- and lactose-free, and as a celiac, I felt completely safe eating here.

Definitely worth the walk from the city center.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Torbert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA21HKzP5r8x4tqM9oY6ai2vvTg9VdBkSNaz8a9TXiovnwGCes=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Purchased several packages of bread online via Glover. Nowhere did it say on the app that it was gluten free.

What I received was the worst bread I’ve ever had, even by gluten free standards. It was obviously not made recently. Dry and tasteless.

I feel very deceived.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Walterscheid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZIFhVbbrFwy8ZC19ya5H7PbMUNcBJwyi2fmdmK_FRu2sGfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our family has been gluten free for many years. We have travelled extensively, always searching out gluten free bakeries on the road. This is hands down the best gf bread that we have come across. It is really excellent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Noy Bieber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcNPfyzxJwEUutv87D1nQl3fNm8_0LuGgf8m5gZ65QwfDsPr8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place, great coffee, wonderful paistries, great service!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pablo Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdIQPd3QhoBz98fPmQdWL9FJkAcFRIZPEyMBzD80GO84wITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I had heard of this bakery many times before but I didn’t bother to read the reviews before going in. Not that the reviews are bad or anything, but this is a GF bakery and I am not celiac. We got a multigrain loaf and some palmeritas. The loaf was strangely very moist, but ok after toasting, but it tasted weird, not bad, but strange. The palmeritas were not very good, pretty soggy and the fact they use margarine instead of butter makes them have little flavor. If I were celiac I would be happy to have a place like this, but I will stick with my regular places, especially since there is no scientific evidence that gluten is bad for you, unless you have an intolerance of course.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Currea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmm9dJ33U-u1z4GZ-V8S8fC7wBCcfNB-XGs-bu2yekPD-4UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best gluten free bread/products in Madrid. [{"Name":"With two N's","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlmK4dSVO8tMNDnsTLjDcvynHg5kHFRHWdQDNLOLuczUvOhRRa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing...I am visiting from New York and I absolutely love my ice cream. I stopped in after dinner and I was in heaven.  The flavors that they offered are great but the presentations are better. They have a great variety of all different ice cream flavors and pastries. The staff was very patient and explained all the flavors and gave me all the samples I wanted. I 100% recommend them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnAYJ2OeR1OijxWjhY2EDf&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Nina Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9hmUHjjBS1nrNNkzP024qy_M5YiDBJIbKFV4VaqoNOes6O0Fo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So many flavor that it was super hard to decide! I like the fact that they are giving out the number and serve one by one - staff super friendly - giving you samples to try before you make decisions. I had a  crepe - the pistachio cream aside and a scoop of cheesecake ice cream. Such a great treat on a summer day ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAp5IxRzGzPrZSJOeq4LSPe&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Lin Alkobi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgfFDIld2biQn3rIE1hx17XexfrM18O028ZbAN5FaqqjVm5-Rn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best sweet you can have!
I already ordered it home take away several times and eaten inside, very tasty!
Everything looks perfect 🧁 I would eaten all if it’s was possible 🥹","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvwpn2Pw&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2024-12-18"},{"Name":"Ahmad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVUNkTUKYUEG1vRkG7FqRpYO6qbCBCTV9989Q7m7T7kCt6-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A good ice cream shop and I would rank it slightly above average. Their ice cream is semi-artisan and the taste is very good. In fact, I would rate the taste four or even five stars (I took pistachio-oreo and coconut). However, the place (table and floor) were not clean and people working there could have been a bit nicer and helpful. I got a large (grande) cone with two scoops. The cone was a bit small for the two giant scoops, so final product was very fragile and subject to fall apart easily. It was not easy eating it without causing a mess around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ_bbx5QE&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2023-7-3"},{"Name":"Nick Preuss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb3Y6gwX_NksjrlUS9aKx0kn6ML6sCOarxTJZ_0fHKjr_OcyM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Not sure what others are talking about in their reviews but this place is FANTASTIC.  Thank god I do not live here or I would weigh 1,000 pounds from coming here.  The ice cream is insanely good and they have some really fun flavors.  Didn't try their baked goods but they looked really good.  Gets really busy in here and it is easy to see why so try to come during off hours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5_t_XRQ&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2023-10-25"},{"Name":"Rennoib Tg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQcYuYWw3GzVSQOWtjmOd4BvTZ9Qtwpv-T0vWERaxErgmbLtC5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ice creams are amazing and acceptable price (3.5 for 2 balls). They optimized the service for too many people, because normally have queue, so first pay for the product that you want and later, you choice the flavours, leaving time to decide.

The ice cream coming with pieces of cake, fruits, cookies or whatever anything was made that flavour. Something that I love.

Personally carrot cake and oreo pistachio for me are ones of the best that I tried.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC6m92KrwE&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2021-9-13"},{"Name":"Chen Jerry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcC53qsyYuxsKEqiBK6r-thjPfaIuty2FpR6PwjechtSIFNxL9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"If you have a sweet tooth, this may be the right place for you. However, ice cream was too sweet for me and it was not as creamy as I expected. As for the cheesecake, the cheese part tasted wonderful but the topping… a heavy glaze of strawberry source with several dried super sweet strawberries… I felt like my teeth were falling off… Staff here were super friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLltPgAw&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2024-6-18"},{"Name":"Harry Flynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWboafIxq-HPXkwVB9sb5F74UTDuT__FQiES47tL-b-wCfGItryCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely delicious- I would recommend Mascapone dulce de leche. I will be coming back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4avcegrz_JTdKW5YSc_x_&fid=0x0:0x180506117a37f44f"],"When":"2025-11-24"}]

[{"Name":"José María Gutiérrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu6IqtcS34w83U4gu-rRpBJAdnkoau2k0wOT18TMpWbXqUxtMS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brownie 🔝","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia Solana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFNifKHT3pDYvoLJJ1QupeHVYuQy1EMn_pYsMFqMoyPkDGr5VE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hay de todo: Roscón de reyes, dulces, magdalenas, empanadas, pan de todos tipos, tartas y mucho más. La mayoría de las cosas son caseras. El servicio es muy amable y aconsejan muy bien.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTK4gZ4YbauNy291H3U4NU&fid=0x0:0x143d6b2129bdfba"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Carol Falero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV93A8bxBcVZCXZMUc7Nc9Sn4_qAJmg430wEeDAfzljC-5sEe9E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El viernes al medio día pasé, pregunté por las empanadas de zamburiñas y me dijeron que son bajo encargo, así que decidí llevarme una de pulpo que me llamó mucho la atención y una tarta de zanahoria. ¡Oh sorpresa! cuando llegue a casa (no vivo precisamente cerca) y me topé con que me habían dado una empanada de atún y no de pulpo.... La empanada estaba buena, pero no fue lo que pedí, ni por lo que pagué, menuda decepción al abrirla. La tarta de zanahoria, eso sí, de las mejores que he probado. Volveré en cuanto pueda a probar la de zamburiñas, y la de pulpo pero pediré que me las abran por si acaso...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh9b-0SQ&fid=0x0:0x143d6b2129bdfba"],"When":"2023-2-18"},{"Name":"Beatriz Liu Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjWgt4yvarDVQWEQrnbwjzTQAfJjpkhiOAPIvidBPv41O9WnKC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Maravilla de panadería y empanaderia. Todos los productos son de primera calidad y totalmente artesanos.
Utilizan semillas deliciosas para hacer los panes.
Todas las medidas de higiene y limpieza.
Trato amabilisimo de esta familia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDSgeSPDw&fid=0x0:0x143d6b2129bdfba"],"When":"2020-12-28"},{"Name":"diana iglesias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsR4YuFnslZCMtw3_jBmHnhQDuZciBpNzFaiBdWRdXDl-KrLfvXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos hemos llevados dos hogazas de pan integral, muy ricas. Tienen una amplia variedad de panes, empanadas... El personal es encantador","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriel Navarro Ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN6ga-7F8HVXCRktdQEUC7z2nwoVstjs9XHknBizgPNU4elA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He probado un pan integral y una tarta de queso, totalmente recomendado, ambas muy top, se nota el cariño y el trabajo que hay detrás de estos panes y postres, volveré sin duda.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ivan Barberá","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkjdP4k0AHctj6CCrkxD8XyiXzblau-5X0-xuCpusW04ExQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Son muy majos los que atienden la verdad. Se ve que cuidan el oficio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"leticia martin-rabadan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0ugvrDgYtAo8LcSy6dthebnkJSNOeEz03JjWOXzg9QiTfZ3s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los mejores panes sin gluten que he probado, el pan de teff y trigo sarraceno son buenísimos. Con textura de pan pan. Tengo ganas de probar mas. A mis hijos les encantan las galletas y las madalenitas con chocolate. Tengo ganas de probar mas cosas. Hay dulces sin azúcar y empanadas con super buena pinta. Se puede llamar y encargar.","Images":null,"When":""}]
