[{"Name":"Noam Surki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbpBF8_l1SS1JcYMUOtAEtT6qHFdnrI0WU4AYj6XrX_gEhPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty gluten free food (with options for non gluten free). Spanish cuisine
Not too expensive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAycAtc9zgkrl9lqbKdXt2&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Andrew Christou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3JavbWCGlnw1d7GBhPfXOYyiAvmfbwxwVg_c32pqL7zFGyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent gluten free spot, very family style and a little chaotic and busy. But we had a great time filled with food and drinks.

Very happy to find a safe gluten free spot, only 3 dishes non-GF and are marked by a different colour on menu.

Forgot to take photos before we started!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGeeaS_oKgQJY-ngTbiqDR&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"James Dooms","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlg6JNNAn_kPtU2LjE0GTPNXOxgtYYMBBuIAUDUHq6FuYtjPnk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Your average no fuss bar with a good selection of classic tapas. We came here based on a recommendation and luckily managed to get a table. Ended up sitting inside because outside was full on a typical summer evening. The tapas options were good and the service was ok. The waitress forgot a dish but quickly processed it when we reminded her. Seems to a be family run place. If you want o experience the local spanish bars with local food, this is a spot to come to. Prices are ok. Maybe a bit higher than what you would expect to pay, but would come back..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrvsnDYA&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2024-7-7"},{"Name":"Barbara Kozłowska-Jakóbik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-yFeVcwQwOI1wmI_PcVW164UInvCZhMA7Lmwp_DPqGfCkk0xD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious tapas in typical Spanish tapas bar. If you want to feel the Spanish vibe and enjoy - this is a place for you! We came twice and already miss this place, truly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6vvjwugE&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2021-9-30"},{"Name":"Carlos Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWn1RTw-zBVUMHWFTZl9QzQlf9FfuQFFfDZg8M8YE5aEsd0cq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious location for lunch.
We ordered Pulpo a la gallega - Galician Octupus
Patatas Bravas or Bravas for short - toasted potatoes in a spicy sauce and a house salad.

The environment is awesome and very friendly. Highly recommend.

All plates are made to share so be mindful of that when ordering.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDekqaNnwE&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2022-10-6"},{"Name":"Christopher Freeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUH7Mk6gCNKhWlkNyhXHAORlqaz9pXFFFQ0s9vrn4kUYjaoWOXu8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The quintessential neighbourhood tapas bar, but one that’s worth a journey. The location of this bar, on an octagonal plaza, is interesting enough, but the bar just does everything so well. A stock of La Chouffe beers says they really care and the classic blackboard of tapas dishes hits the spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC29K-VKA&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2022-4-14"},{"Name":"Megan M Edwards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuM3ziNA2nuIvHgC5h1wVny7L5fJk9Axp_lKGVV1hP8DJsQDWrWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been to this place so many times, it's one of my favourites for gluten-free tapas in the city! They don't really advertise it, but almost the entire menu is suitable for coeliacs, there are only a few items that aren't (I think they're currently the items in red on the menu, but always worth checking with the waiting staff).

Typical old-fashioned Spanish bar inside, with a little terrace in the lovely Plaza de Olavide. It is very popular so might be hard to get a table, but it is well worth it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Dalledonne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1PTJsLP_zDNePntg3hctdU8qc1DpuVZ3_C62f_J2eB8d3NgGu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lively little place, true feeling of a tapas bar madrilena. Staff is lovely, food is amazing for people who suffer from coeliac disease. A tiny gem","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMjI65Ag&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2019-10-20"}]

[{"Name":"Angelo Gaspar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgKAq9Vd8pzOrpVZu_oFBqP9rNw0UAmfEsu3xE9rM7L-DckQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent restaurant!
Great food, cozy atmosphere, and very friendly staff. Everything was delicious and beautifully presented. Totally worth it — highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3f62DgzQFOoemSiwh3bXZ&fid=0x0:0xb324245f429f429e"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Rachel Stephens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGsdjSv1O_vgn32KLkelaO9Nw1vBtGCZ0CTwqr6vVKEq3Kybo32Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My husband and I went here last week as I am a Celiac. We took the metro specifically to try this restaurant out because my husband wanted to try cachopo after watching a true crime documentary on Netflix where the main character called himself the "King of Cachopo."

When we arrived there was a group playing bagpipes at full blast. Unfortunately we were directed to a table in the same room as the bag pipers. I believe these people were other customers celebrating something, but it was incredibly annoying and loud.

We asked for menus multiple times and it wasn't until after our cider had been delivered that we got our menus. It took too long waiting around to receive the menu.

My Spanish is poor, but my husband and I were able to order the croquettes (variety) as a starter and we each got a different type of cachopo and I ordered the gluten-free bread with chimichurri.

For some reason despite the restaurant claiming to be 100% gluten-free, they offer a regular bread option, which could contaminate the kitchen. I don't understand the purpose of even offering regular gluten bread at this restaurant.

The croquettes came out with the main meal instead of as a starter. We unfortunately only ate ⅓ of the croquettes because the non-meat croquettes tasted mostly of blue cheese. Not a fan.

The gluten-free bread for €2.50 wasn't a good value because it was literally just a bread roll. It wasn't even warm.

I had to remind the waiter that I ordered chimichurri. What arrived was a vinegar-based red sauce rather than true chimichurri made with parsley.

The cachopo was huge and enough for 3 people. Our waiter had warned us that it was big but we got our leftovers to go.

For 1 cider, 1 appetizer of croquettes, 2 cachopo and 1 bread roll was about €80 and took 2 hours.

I would have liked to have been sat downstairs away from the noisy bagpipers, had a menu when we sat down, and had the starter brought out as an a starter rather than with the main meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYwfTrGw&fid=0x0:0xb324245f429f429e"],"When":"2025-5-4"},{"Name":"pablo profili","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8_8wqf5e9_EGMVrD5ojFtvsgt6tTh1aehrHyMfA0hWjCpqqde=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We had a disappointing experience. The cachopo was undercooked, salty and chewy, while the beef fillet came out extremely overcooked and rushed. For three people, we paid €130 (2 starters, 2 mains, 3 glasses of wine, and 2 coffees, no dessert), which felt overpriced given the poor quality of the food. The atmosphere was also uncomfortable: the air conditioning upstairs was far too strong, while downstairs it was uncomfortably warm with an unattractive fan blowing toward the bar. Overall, not a place I would recommend for either quality or value.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfonso A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK91A2pfZ9Q0vL9qD1ucBccJ9-Hmqhu_jMF-BtSUl64eqb6-F4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best steak in Madrid by far. Nice location, friendly crew and great value for money. Can’t stop coming here.

———//Update July 2022//———

We kept coming here and the quality of the meat it’s still intact. However staff is not as attentive as it used to be , they are all over the place. And sometimes they invite you to order above your possibilities , which is something we don’t appreciate. We don’t like to waste food. Hence , we are demoting El Quesu to 4 stars.

——————// Update October 2022//————-

Excellent service and quality back again. 5 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6_9nwMg&fid=0x0:0xb324245f429f429e"],"When":"2021-10-16"},{"Name":"W. This is a must","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIk5P9ygE&fid=0x0:0xd61f3ddf50654306"],"When":"2025-4-4"},{"Name":"David Karst","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-wJjdewMYXYUP4daEtxdVBg4YpTvhQPht0XR3WqslDBxJRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for the best bakery experience, this spot is an absolute gem. From the moment you walk in, the aroma of fresh-baked pastries pulls you in, and the warm, welcoming staff make you feel right at home. They even spoke English, which made it easy for me to ask about their recommendations.

But let’s talk about the croissants: they’re simply phenomenal. Flaky, buttery, and perfectly baked—the best I’ve ever had, hands down. Each bite practically melts in your mouth, with that ideal balance of a crispy exterior and a tender, airy interior. It’s worth a trip just for these alone.

And then there’s the raisin nut bread. I’m not exaggerating when I say it’s to die for! Packed with the perfect blend of raisins and crunchy nuts, it’s slightly sweet with a hint of richness that pairs beautifully with a morning coffee or just on its own.

Between the mouth-watering baked goods and the friendliest service, this bakery truly stands out. [{"Name":"Mauro Deffendini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH1-Qxz4Kd23rXnxkA9xtwEU2cyTR4gR3fcsMmAASESGAQbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This kitchen is literally on fire, their signature touch is spice, and it runs through almost every dish. Tucked away in a corner of the Vallehermoso gastronomic market, where it feels like every stall competes to outdo the others with gourmet creations, Kitchen 154 serves up an Asian-fusion menu with its own twists on classic recipes. The place is usually packed, so best to grab a reservation if you want to be on the safe side.

With that buzz and the full house, I walked in with high expectations. Unfortunately, my experience fell a bit short. Let me start with the least exciting picks.

The Dan Dan Lamian, described as a meatball noodle with Sichuan spice, landed flat. It felt like a watered-down mashup between Italian Bolognese and noodles. Not too spicy, which I appreciated, but overall, it lacked any memorable flavor, just blaaaaa….

Next came the dumplings. On paper, they sounded intriguing, filled with butifarra, meat, and kimchi. In reality, the butifarra was almost nonexistent, and the hoisin-style sauce they were drowned in didn’t bring anything special.

I had high hopes for the ribs, expecting them to be the star of the menu. Instead, they were another near miss. Plenty of tender meat, yes, but so heavily coated in kimchi and Korean sauce that all you could taste was an overpowering, spicy BBQ note. Not bad, but not worthy of being called a house classic.

Finally, redemption arrived with the shrimp in red curry sauce. This dish was a knockout. The curry hit that perfect balance between spicy and sweet, even reminding me of a proper khao soi soup. Packed with flavor, I ended up drinking the sauce like a soup. The wok-fried vegetables, cherry tomatoes, rice, and shrimp, brought everything together into a succulent Asian delight. Honestly, I’d come back just for this dish.

Service was fast, but with the staff clearly overwhelmed by the crowd, it felt rushed and mechanical, which took away from the experience. The space was extremely tight, hard to really enjoy your meal comfortably.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAjRhT37-7ckLrOJG6IsKv7&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Kyle Merrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIe-Xskxi42nJvRzUnfYni802Zjx_rIU6FtK6TY6kOInRafA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me and my wife wanted to eat here but is was absolutely packed. No seats anywhere and the wonderful woman who worked here (I wish I knew her name) came out and literally set up a table for us all the way on the other side of the market at a bar so we could eat here. We got the Korean bbq ribs, wings and spicy squid. All of it was packed with flavor and the ribs fall off the bone tender. The people working here are so incredibly wonderful and can see why this spot is so popular.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"praddeep demudu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpSz7NfxcYyL5JXmX-JUy6BoHfP8H6ylLk4k24d7nE9cYmZwSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved it…. Every bit of it. The pork ribs… the best. Succulent and the meat falls of the bone. Greta combination with rice, kimchi and pickled cucumbers and onions.

We also tried the chilli fried chicken which was good too and also the prawn curry too. The level of spice was just right… rich in flavour and its one was the best curries I have tried outside of asia. Very authentic.

The staff were friendly and attentive. Great ambience… buzzing and everyone is just happy to be eating. The whole place has a cool vibe.

Can’t wait to try it again when we are back in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICftoPjbw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2024-12-28"},{"Name":"Jessica Bello Salguero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjf3k_eq67JiyzvMCplcIKm_dc9S8kBYqfrvEsScxxHPWqrFPlOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It disappointed us. We expected the ribs to be soft and not chewy, the dumplings were ok but nothing amazing. I don’t  understand why this place has such a hype. The staff was ok but not extremely friendly. Maybe we did not ordered that well? Would hesitate to come back again…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ2JKJ-wE&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Santiago Redondo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKtRj25HqdlOMODDopE-MucOOt7zq5pM0pijw-5OASkkLyAPV2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a highly recommended place if you like asian insanely-spicy food.
Everything is cooked at low temperatures for several hours so the food gets so tender and so tasty that you will repeat coming to this place over and over again.
Eating here is a bargain too. Food and beverages are very low priced you can get fully satisfied for less than 20 €.
Koran BBQ ribs, chicken wings and shrimp curry are a must.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk5q64ZQ&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2018-2-28"},{"Name":"R E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXG5sldq-vQkgQxeVxv8O_suSh3Dx1vhBRf2wglEWQerF2R3qToKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A classic visit to this already legendary restaurant in Madrid. I came 5/6 years ago, and now I went back in May 2023, I have to say that nothing changed: super friendly staff and good attention, ribs with certain vinager flavor (Korean style, this could be the most known dish), sweet chicken wings and a short menu that includes asian flavors suck as curry and will make you enjoy a nice dine. Only con: the famous double shift will wake you up from your table sooner than expected. But a safe choice in any case","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxjNi5Kw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2023-5-11"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Go!!!!!!!!!!

Ok, the dumplings are AMAZING! An explosion of tastes that tickle your taste buds.
The wings… I don’t even like wings but here Hong Kong meets Spain that meets Mexico that meets the US.

Everything in this place is incredible, the staff are the absolute sweetest.
Do yourself a favour and book in advance because: you do not want to miss this experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVz5Wifg&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2023-12-18"},{"Name":"Luis D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLDCLTNBMDYiVksV5vg8SUI3lAtrhXM2nBFJptO0w7pM4dT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favourite places in Madrid. I love the vibe, seating while seeing the kitchen.

They got a simple menu with a couple of options, all great.

I always go for the shrimp red curry and with the Sichuan eggplants. they're just amazing.

Service isn't great or fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn4qaBUw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2024-9-24"}]

Mucha masa y dura con algo rojo dentro con apariencia de crema pastosa sin sabor. La de hojaldre con queso y cebolla caramelizada directamente me ha producido ardores. He acabado en otro local muy cerca comiendo otra empanada de carne recién hecha y sabrosa. No me volvrran a ver.
Concretamente el sábado 12 de junio de 2021. Aunque no vro el por qué de la solicitud de la fecha en tanto en cuanto la calidad de los productos no dependen de la misma sino de la exugida por el propietario. De todas formas que quede claro que el comentario es con idea constructiva para, según mi opinión, provocar un cambio a mejor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Aquí lo que importa es lo esencial: lo que ves, está bueno… y lo que pruebas, sienta bien. Todo tiene ese punto casero, honesto, bien hecho. El tipo de sitio al que da gusto volver porque no engaña: cumple, gusta y se disfruta. Muy recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJT4fET4EVVEHFXEIwCKJRbZ6a2ceaTHGNtu06ToQX0MXM-Mg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pequeña y sencilla pastelería en Chamberí. Mi hermana suele acudir con frecuencia, sobre todo a por sus palmeras glaseadas, le encantan.

Este año decidimos encargar el roscón con ellos, vistas las buenas críticas, y fue un total acierto. Fresco, tierno y delicioso.

Excelente roscón, totalmente artesano, en contra de lo que se afirma en alguna otra reseña. La calle olía a roscón, era una delicia. Te atienden además con mucha amabilidad.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JUAN V ESTEVE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWpxtbAWikxZeDCTRBgmtaqTZCZZ_FFEKODHzSlR8-97ZRJ0XI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Servicio muy bueno y pastelería riquísima","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana P.S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBt6huXQKdUEJi-Wxl-x9W5IPwEhcshCbsugiLWikRY0RCXhE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Compré unos pasteles para un cumpleaños y estaban muy buenos, en relación calidad precio están dentro de lo normal. Tienen bocadillos que hacen ellos y están muy buenos, son como los que puedas haber tu en tu casa, muy caseros, as mí me encantó el de jamón serrano con tomate y aceite, y el precio no está mal. Los dos dependientes de la pastelería son muy agradables, muy amables.
Algo que decir en contra, es el granizado de limón, a mí no me gustó nada, la verdad.
En general es un sitio muy recomendable.","Images":null,"When":""}]

address: C. de Balmes, 3, Chamberí, 28010 Madrid

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS4QuLdy0JtkcJi5YKmmqKWo04AQY6mnrWXTA1VW-qyIYgdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I'm a halachic jew (my mother and grandmother are Jews), a mother of 2 small Jewish boys and I haven't been granted even a visit. Don't fulfill the application as you won't get a response — I'm still waiting for it for almost a year. The "application" consists in numerous phone calls and emails where you get an appointment in MONTHS, what a busy reception schedule. My appointment was held in July, in boiling Madrid. I was 8 months pregnant and they wanted to interview me in a 1,5 square meter entrance without air-conditioning nor ventilation. When I asked if the interview could be held in another place, I was refused. I asked for anything to make the conditions less severe, considering I was pregnant. The receptionist replied: "I don't know you, why shall I treat you well?". Wow. Because we are humans...?

The same man, when I passed by the place years ago to get to know it, without greeting me, he approached and said: "What are you looking for? Nowadays there are many people pretending to be Jews". Are there?

Years after the warm welcome, I phoned to make another try to approach the community, the SAME man (/receptionist/interviewer/street security/phone operator) asked: "Why haven't you tried to visit us before?". The man is also a comedian.

I've been a part of loving Jewish communities in UK, Russia and USA. This place is... astonishing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay Zucker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpwMBFuAi2wMq5OKf6R7ifeKM4i7fHPTFnRUI8ebMLYdImUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We wanted to visit.  We approached the main door as people were coming in and the young man at the door was extremely RUDE.  We wanted to see the synagogue and the sukkah and were refused entry.  We are American Jews living in Spain and wanted connection with our Jewish community.  In an age of increased anti-semitism, it is discourging and shameful that we cannot be kind to our fellow Jews.  Chag Sameach, happy sukkot and a sweet new year regardless of how you treated us.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"meyerbeer13","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvTE7YUizLSK6h4f-cu4yV1jscKg4obtzPUQ2ls0-yvtRE-eM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I came on the evening of Yom Kippur. I managed to get in for Kol Nidre, even though apparently they had sold seats, which surprised me, because I thought that was only in America. But when I came back the next day the security detail said only people who had paid could come in. The evening before the rabbi had asked everyone to come in the morning to make sure there was a minyan all day long. So I don't know where the problem came from. But it was the most disgraceful thing I have ever experienced in a shul. I went to Jerba (in Tunisia) one year and had no problem getting in for the whole service. This kind of stuff makes Jews look bad and is against Judaism. So I guess they are working on their sins for next year.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Hirsch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBs-n3P8-1lDUyWgC14qu0F7OKAsNTy-0YeTDsObYF4fajWVzY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Warm, welcoming and friendly community. Hope to return soon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Benoliel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5rpkD0IQZWFO-lKXNW3sYZiUz6n_o-rNwn1sUV6AY69WTbgaI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly Sephardic orthodox shul. Bring ID","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Truth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0sC7STHeowY8zA7iSEdBxnky1SSENf4fs2Lw7Wn2ZvT-3qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great center can find anything jewish here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adi Gamliel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUttoc25A9UeUVg19vjQ5U-CBDFOmFLGDEfclV612egvLAM2dUKSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Jewish community","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID0_9DBVw&fid=0x0:0x31314b601908f688"],"When":"2019-11-7"},{"Name":"ali hassan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaZCSh-hADoTV5473-FRKoxGo1aJkj6DUxmhsZEQX_ZE-3YEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Dirty place","Images":null,"When":""}]

El pan es CONGELADO y me han mostrado la prueba 😡😡😡😡
Después de acudir a probar sus panes, conocimos a una persona que ha sido encargada de una de sus panaderias y nos aseguró:
El pan es congelado, de ahí que no se recominde comerlo pasadas 48 horas de la compra. Tampoco recomiendan congelarlo pues porque ya lo han congelado con anterioridad.
En fin una decepción.
No volveremos a comprar en ninguna panaderia de Levaduramadre porque si informasen que es congelado y el precio no fuese tan elevado por ser un pan inicialmente congelado, igual la gente no estaría engañada y quien sabe...
Sobre la opinión digo a todo supuestamente porque yo no he visto si les llega congelado o no, pero esta persona aseguró tener videos probando que es congelado y me los mostró.
¡Qué decepción!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marmota con pedigrí","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTqRBt9MaSBfpIwIZyNotJ6q8aartg2xPzOtBeFDIzRLuhuB0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una franquicia con productos de calidad, personal encantador y el problema de tener que elegir... Ya que te tienta comprarlo todo, pues tiene pinta de estar todo riquísimo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDATxqgQhD7cAFfwBh7VtXa&fid=0x0:0x6a273daa1943db08"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Elena Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUogZDHUP8pGWiDqE23jS-XLb_-p3id9UkSdaOtaHJc7IJRmoc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El acierto total para un buen desayuno: zumo natural, ricas tostadas integrales y un café. Cierto es que el café no destaca por su sabor, pero las tostadas son excepcionales. Además, la gran variedad de pan (te lo cortan en lonchas si quieres) y de bollería alegran la vista. El interior es agradable, de estilo rústico, música suave, la atención buenísima. Los precios es tan bien: un desayuno con tostadas (aceite+tomate), zumo y café costó 3,95€, ofrecen buena cantidad de tomate natural rallado y de tostadas. Por ejemplo, pan de espelta integral me costó 4,45 €. Muy buen sitio, recomendable para comprar pan, desayunar, tomar u un café con croissant o almorzar.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICUnMynxAE&fid=0x0:0x6a273daa1943db08"],"When":"2019-7-20"}]

[{"Name":"Sandra TM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKMxjbY-U_plWPf0H7qga4B_HoM9cyZXt7rWFP11HztP1_uNbI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cafetería con un local amplio y muy agradable, con tres espacios: salón interior, terraza al aire libre y terraza acristalada.
La atención al cliente es buena y el café merece la pena.
Tienen unas gran variedad de productos, muy completa y de calidad:
- Bollería: rollo de canela, croissant de mantequilla, pain au chocolat, mini brioche de chocolate trenzado, “berlisianas” (glaseada sin relleno, chocolate crema, praliné, nata, frutos rojos o dulce de leche), palmeritas de azúcar o chocolate, palmeras grandes y mini cookies.
- Trufas con diferentes rellenos: chocolate blanco, Kinder Bueno, turrón, Oreo, galleta y caramelo, chocolate Dubái…
- Mini sándwiches: pollo curry, vegetal y mixto.

Si quieres desayunar bien, con calma y en un ambiente agradable, es un sitio que recomiendo sin duda.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQwywyvDuwQSYmjrGzSjMY&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Javier Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWvsQoZXStiuSFKhhaGmi1HJFNGMCE3g081wgwt9LLkcBwWaI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Comimos allí unos huevos y una ensalada, bien atendido y con buena calidad. El café por supuesto perfecto","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFeVBW8RYNOMCS7KQcG_xK&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"On Yedi Fiesta Omnibus SL Fernando","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVydHsk0VWz9veObdf_LEMXtzFRDZA9XMcHiV_FT6rRL6dLt_4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La calidad del producto, muy bueno, los dulces..... Pero la atención es PÉSIMA!!! te piden en un cartelito, que tengas paciencia, pero tienes que venir con MUUUUUUCCCHHHAAAA paciencia. Tardan muchísimo, te lo traen por partes, primero la tostada y luego el café.....
Es un lugar MUY CARO, pero algunas cosas valen la pena..... Un café x 3€ me parece carísimo.  Es mejor comprar unas tartas o tartaletas y salir......","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRsP_5nKvM_UoLzwzOwyHz&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Juan Fonseca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUce3OYY-1oFF0b72V5__pL6p_26TCFRNzfYc1oePa77nNALhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Balvisiama de Aravaca es un sitio fantástico. Cada producto está hecho con una calidad excepcional: desde los croissants y las tartas hasta los pasteles más elaborados, todo tiene un sabor casero y refinado. El local es acogedor y elegante, perfecto para disfrutar de un café con algo dulce. El personal es siempre amable y atento, lo que hace que la experiencia sea aún mejor.
Sin duda, un lugar imprescindible en Aravaca para los amantes de la buena repostería. ¡Totalmente recomendable! Están empezando con lo que paciencia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBnFTguvLH0oH_P07McB7qt&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Ricardo nme","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmVU9ZRl_6-Qh7Qx2NoTRGpQbFSo_ji1RLQJyO3GF_-2wGXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un acierto de local en Valdemarin. Una pastelería que además de sus trufas espectaculares tiene tartaletas dulces y salado muy rico. El packaging es un acierto. Ojalá les vaya bien. Suerte","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfYOrxe3kKox-kvnvIQCA4&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Elfyt TT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHyVXU_gBtRemN2-R8MjBCetuBJkyDhYaoW5ByN8PbubkNpic=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hoy fui a tomar un te con un postrecito que nunca probé, y quedé asombrado por las dos, la verdad que muy buenos. El personal es lo que hace que la review tenga 5 estrellas, son atentos y muy risueños, y de eso falta mucho hoy en día, se aprecia mucho.
Un 10 para esta tienda, quedé muy satisfecho","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBR8h-XqEYZPfWazQjKfX9C&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Maria Cabal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKH1qtWxtMcGF1WIzMYiq5a67KyIChfLFJ78pdAOucKwX3_lA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui a probar el producto de navidad y quede encantada!! Muy contenta de que hayan abierto una cafetería en aravaca, es muy hermosa, amplia, acogedora y la limpieza impecable. Enhorabuena
Sin duda volveré!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVThjIGWQ_7Lja829P0dw3&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Roberto Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4VYpQ2r3_PuvDfkJ1B5nyMpN5Rue5E6TqhjxDc_d7AWPD0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La comida estaba genial pero la experiencia quedó deslucida por el personal, que aunque fue agradable y educado, desgraciadamente no estaban en su mejor día.

Tiempos de espera demasiado grandes aunque eran cinco atendiendo para nosotros solos. Vino una señora con niños y a los cinco minutos se fueron cansados de que no les atendiera nadie. En nuestro caso pedimos huevos benedict, sándwich, cafés y un vaso de agua. Todo riquísimo como digo. Pedí café solo largo y me trajeron dos sorbos (un espresso). Cuando termine de comer les volví a recordar el agua. Seguía sin venir. Cuando pedí la cuenta vinieron a cobrar directamente sin mostrar la cuenta primero, y por supuesto sin el agua.

Pequeños detalles que marcan la diferencia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtj0j-Z5U7U19ukAyNWygi&fid=0x0:0xa50b385b24e163ad"],"When":"2025-10-26"}]

[{"Name":"Dennis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuYSfJ6IOiw-PsAC8GJmv0XvYJoooHajO0NkvM7Ts0YVdgSekH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's a nice cafe. We stopped by to check their pastry. And it was very delicious. We really liked everything that we ordered. The donuts were especially yummy.

There's no table service - you have to order at the counter. But you can sit down at the table. Otherwise, nice place to eat your sugary breakfast.

PS. It cost around 12 Euros for what you can see on the picture.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ88arwwE&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2023-7-22"},{"Name":"Dylan Dellett-Wion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIzNzJ9i4bg6TVfRZr60cIEqWJEtFirdAGnpj87DxOgHGzV-U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My AirBnB was super close by to Panica, so I went there nearly every day of my weeklong trip to Madrid. We would love it if the quality could return to what it was before as the last few times have been a little disappointing.
We came in here since we saw they had rosquillas through the window. We went inside to inquire if they were anis since we have been searching for a good source near home for a while now. They told us they were anis so we took home half a dozen. If these have anis, it is imperceptable, although they did taste good. They have a mild lemony and oily taste with a texture that melts in your mouth, they are good, but not anis rosquillas, hopefully they will consider taking the flavor up a few notches, because as of right now, these are very good lemon donuts.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alon Eder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKAw__ydLXW3I_86azg2uv6qI-W9pRQWCjns4yiyxpabEHgrr0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great local coffee and pastries place. Friendly service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"E V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGagZRJ-SkSizpfJHGZBpa1bOQbYK4HjbnvEtZtVt5wL78q6Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"not great don't expect much","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInllfh_VBA_1gZ9jX31x9bgd3AXnfwPL5LKDuQSmqRenOHoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Panadería gourmet lo que más me gusta es el pan de espelta pero los pasteles están buenísimos y ahora el roscon de Reyes igual, lo único el precio pero va acorde a la calidad","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXCELRZ0u-WcAU_P5f5hqy&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Fran Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITbbXp5R_1rlbPOaV836Yd-Fxrc8DtV5lgoJSVU6wuhsFylA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Visité esta pastelería por primera vez y la experiencia fue tan buena que no podía dejar de compartirla. Desde el momento en que entras, todo transmite cuidado y dedicación: el aroma irresistible de los dulces recién horneados, la vitrina repleta de opciones tentadoras y una atención al cliente cercana, amable y muy profesional.

Probé varios dulces y todos estaban exquisitos. Se nota la calidad de los ingredientes, la técnica y, sobre todo, el cariño con el que están hechos. En especial, me encantaron [aquí puedes mencionar alguno: “las milhojas”, “el pastel de zanahoria”, “las tartaletas de frutas”], que estaban realmente espectaculares: frescos, bien equilibrados y con una presentación impecable.

Además del sabor, valoro mucho cuando el trato es cálido y personalizado, y aquí eso se siente desde el primer minuto. Me asesoraron con paciencia, me explicaron los ingredientes y me hicieron sentir muy bienvenido.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPrEuMzMuIyMjAE&fid=0x0:0xb6aca18de55944e5"],"When":"2025-5-7"},{"Name":"Purificación Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiE2_UCOXr23WoGHeIyodlI3unkBMbrVEAIB7dF6t0gfQVkA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El día 1 de marzo encargué una tarta de San Marcos de las pequeñas para recogerla el 2 de marzo, se recogió dicho dia y mi sorpresa fue que me dieron una tarta congelada la cual va al peso y al ser al peso el valor es mayor, compré 3 productos un pan Paris €1,10, una bolsa de patatas€ 2,90 y en total me cobraron €35,20 llame por teléfono al ver que la tarta venía congelada y me dijeron que llevaban 2 días congeladas y que las tartas no se pueden hacer reciente aunque sea  de encargo solo si casualmente ese día tenga que hacer tartas para su exposición, pero esa información no se la dan al cliente la omiten al momento de hacer el encargo y así uno pueda elegir si la quiere o no por lo cual yo me sentí engañada, yo soy una cliente que frecuentaba mucho el lugar pero luego de lo sucedido no ya comprare más ni lo recomendaré más por qué tienen una atención telefónica muy chulesca cuando uno presenta el reclamo, si uno hace un pedido por encargo es para que se le entregue un producto fresco no congelado de días ya que para eso sale mejor ir a un centro comercial y comprar que el precio es 3 veces menor y se sabe que están congeladas y no engañan al cliente","Images":null,"When":""}]

Mi marido y yo hemos probado, sobre todo la pastelería, y tiene un sabor que te quita las penas. Os recomiendo, de entre todos los manjares, los milhojas de crema y nata, y el de frambuesa. La tarta es yema está para no parar de comerla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClib201gE\u0026fid=0x0:0xf1b87aa30fc5a3f4"],"When":"2023-11-21"},{"Name":"EF_81__","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE23XLQ9jbtBoYGViVucWMQ9NsYWE-ylyyg2wYUoym63iEmSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buena experiencia en la sucursal de Urquijo. Los productos tienen calidad, especialmente los full es y sándwiches de miga que estaban muy frescos. El café acompaña bien y el ambiente es tranquilo. Atención buena. Recomendable para merendar.","Images":null,"When":""}]

No digo que todos sus productos sean así, pero esto no es profesional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCreiGvjxzThD14wGwkdQxg&fid=0x0:0xe67d6d0e9fc9103e"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Marta Sáez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLppmS7CncEQgtWi9bFcLgfQ3QS6Unbrs7JNu-j0zErnPW5aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La verdad muy decepcionada con el roscón de reyes sin relleno, como una piedra comprado la misma tarde de reyes, incomible probablemente estaba allí desde hace días o era congelado, menos mal que compré otro en otro sitio también sino nos hubiéramos quedado sin merienda de reyes.
El roscón con nata muy bueno y los minis también pero esto me hace no volver a comprar aquí, si no abarcan tantos pedidos que no los acepten.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jose antonio Bensusan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWVxscG_VNYOEF2xnsl4R_b7R3EEnveHxQKr8TY912FpH_DA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Estimados señores:

Soy cliente habitual de su panadería y, desde la apertura del establecimiento de la calle Princesa —al vivir cerca—, acudo prácticamente a diario. Siempre he quedado muy satisfecho tanto con la calidad del pan y la bollería como con la amabilidad del personal, motivo por el cual continúo confiando en ustedes.

No obstante, me gustaría trasladarles una incidencia ocurrida hoy a las 12:30 h. Fui atendido por una empleada a la que no había visto anteriormente y, al proceder al pago en efectivo mientras buscaba las monedas, percibí una actitud claramente molesta. La empleada dejó las monedas de mala manera sobre el mostrador y se despidió con malas formas, resultando una experiencia desagradable y poco acorde con el trato al cliente al que su establecimiento nos tiene acostumbrados.

Quiero dejar claro que este hecho puntual no hará que deje de acudir a su panadería, pero considero importante que tengan conocimiento de la situación, ya que no todo el personal parece estar igualmente capacitado para la atención al público.

Les agradezco su tiempo y atención.

Un saludo cordial y feliz Año Nuevo,

Un cliente habitual","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julia Perez Soro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb9Ny55ued4tAUVMVUV3YKddPUqXEUw1ALOsaxGGE9hl9kRT7Cjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Conozco las panaderias Turris de cuando vivia en barcelona y siempre que paso por alguna de las de Madrid entro a por algo, tienen cosas riquisimas, los minicroisants saladitos un vicio, ayer en concreto pase por este y fui a por una palmera de chocolate que estan riquísimas, ls dependientas fueron super amables y  era ya casi hora de cerrar y me preguntaron si me gustaba el pistacho y me regalaron un croissant que supongo que al dia siguiente no estaba en buen estado, esa tarde estaba perfecto y riquísimo yo no soy demasido fan del pistacho pero este me recordó a los que comí en Napoles! Me
Encanta que cada vez hay mas Turris en Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEP_44ZmasfPb4QE&fid=0x0:0xe67d6d0e9fc9103e"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"dario belchin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2x0KtWrSywGfu1KK_B1Swd_y1bImeVv2FbGoYhkPFGOK35w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El producto como siempre es impresionante , la atención de algunas dependientas es bueno ,de otras es nefasto , y no hay un solo día q vengas a las 9:00 en fin de semana ,y estén abiertos . Que yo también trabajo los findes y se que es una lata , pero si pones un horario y te desplazas y tienes que estar en la puerta 15 minutos ,pues es un fastidio","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nidp nui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi9ugE60lyifNxQHNSlGTb_Xv9djYeuloz-k4__KlREKWJtg-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Me llevé una palmera a 1'85€, un croissant a 1'55€ y un trozo de bizcocho de limón al peso. Además me regalaron unos panecillos de viena, agradezco mucho el detalle.
Sin duda la palmera fue lo mejor, crujiente pero jugosa, muy caramelizada y un sabor muy agradable. El croissant sería lo siguiente mejor, rico y con una buena textura. El bizcocho neutral. Lo recomiendo sobretodo porque además tiene buen precio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7j66L7gE&fid=0x0:0xe67d6d0e9fc9103e"],"When":"2024-8-29"}]

- 2x Magdalena (0,80€) - limón (lemon) and manzana (apple). Nothing exciting.

La primera vez estaba caminando por la calle y me llamó la atención el nuevo local. Entré a probar un croissant y me encantó.
Luego he regresado para probar los eclairs y son deliciosos!!! También recomiendo los chouquettes, postre típico de la pastelería francesa para acompañar el café o té.
Por las tardes podrán encontrar a Carmen, dueña del negocio, quien siempre te atiende con una sonrisa y muchísima amabilidad.
Tienen su propio obrador y hacen unos panes buenísimos.
El local es pequeño, cuentan con una barra y 3 mesas, y es muy acogedor. Te invita a tomarte un café y una bollería.
Sin duda seré cliente frecuente. ☺️
Tienen otro local en Calle de Alonso Cano 64, Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3psWtTA&fid=0x0:0x72ebe761abed7356"],"When":"2024-11-14"},{"Name":"Fer Soria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVocQYZbn5b3EuKnmhdnSGhclie8yl2I4COd_99voXeCHy_hdW8JA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Probé 2 piezas distintas de panadería y realmente estaban DELICIOSAS. Definitely worth the walk from the city center.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Torbert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWA21HKzP5r8x4tqM9oY6ai2vvTg9VdBkSNaz8a9TXiovnwGCes=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Purchased several packages of bread online via Glover.
